candidate_definition_hints.text: Miniscule cross-platform eventing, networking & crypto for async applications

µSockets is the non-blocking, thread-per-CPU foundation library used by [µWebSockets](https://github.com/uNetworking/uWebSockets). It provides optimized networking - using the same opaque API (programming interface) across all supported transports, event-loops and platforms (QUI…
